recap: Deleted sidequest-end script and tests; replaced its allowlist entry with sidequest.
Rewrote sidequest to take a filepath argument; slug derived from basename; filepath passed as Claude prompt; --focus/--prompt/--no-focus flags removed; tests rewritten.

Added --repo-dir flag to sidequest (cd + git-directory-is-repository guard); updated SKILL.md Step 1 to 'Gather prerequisites', resolving repo via project-path, and Step 3 to call sidequest with optional --repo-dir.
